title: The Crew Finds a Dragon
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9. The central beat is the crew finds a dragon.
scene: The scene focuses on the crew finds a dragon, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can feel your presence, PFFT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Luffy's right... this thing really can talk!!

summary: The Crew Finds a Dragon. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
